title: The Cursed Heart
description: 🫀 The Cursed Heart — a terrifying new monster awaits you in the shadows of Minecraft…
body:
🫀 The Cursed Heart — a terrifying new monster awaits you in the shadows of Minecraft…

Deep within its dark biome lurks a heart-shaped horror. 💔
It’s not cute. It’s not harmless. It’s fast — faster than anything you’ve seen — and it can kill you in seconds.

When you see it, you only have two choices:
👣 Run.
⚔️ Or strike it down… but beware:

🕷️ Killing it may be easy — just one hit — but it leaves you with a deadly curse.
You’ll starve, your health will drain, and you’ll feel as though your heart has been ripped out.

But if you endure…
💀 And if you manage to kill it and survive the curse…
You can claim its head. Eating it grants you an extra row of hearts ❤️‍🔥 — which you’ll desperately need to survive this nightmare.

🔥 Find it. Fight it. Fear it.
Download now and face the challenge… if you dare. ☠️

⚠️ Requires:
📦 [GeckoLib] — version compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1
